title: Add machine-readable discovery surfaces
diff_sketch: Add capabilities --json, robot-docs guide, and --robot-triage in src/help.ts/src/cli.ts; pin in test/cli.test.ts.

title: Make CLI fallback support planned probes and operational context
diff_sketch: Add --probe/--query plus --cwd/--branch/--reason flags and map them to SearchSessionsInput.

title: Return parseable JSON help and JSON errors for JSON-first agents
diff_sketch: Treat --json --help as capabilities JSON and emit JSON stderr envelope for --json parse failures.

title: Close CLI search resources after each invocation
diff_sketch: Wrap searchSessions in try/finally and call search.close so FFF children do not keep CLI processes alive.

title: Make doctor help first-try friendly
diff_sketch: Add doctorHelpText and short-circuit --help/-h/help before preflight parsing.

title: Make unknown-source warnings teach the recovery path
diff_sketch: Include enabled source names and concrete recovery command hint in source-filter warnings.

title: Resolve Pass 2 MCP/version/source-inspection deferrals
diff_sketch: Read package version for MCP server info, pin FastMCP text-content behavior without outputSchema, and add CLI-only sources --json config inspection while preserving the single search_sessions MCP tool.

title: Add typo-aware flag suggestions for CLI parse errors
diff_sketch: Teach src/cli.ts parse errors to compare unknown --flags against the known flag set and emit 'did you mean --json?' plus an exact corrected command in both human stderr and --json error envelopes. Pin with tests for --jsno, --jason, and --max-result.

title: Make doctor parse errors teach the next command
diff_sketch: Update src/fff-preflight.ts parse-error catch path to print the usage block plus a suggested command, and add did-you-mean suggestions for --skip-smoke, --list-orphans, --reap-orphans, and --command.

title: Broaden the documented exit-code contract beyond user-input-error
diff_sketch: Document and use category-specific exit codes where the tool can distinguish them: 1=user-input-error, 3=tool-environment-error for missing/unusable fff-mcp, 4=upstream-failure for backend failures that abort the command. Keep search partial failures as JSON warnings with exit 0.
